title: README And Full Verification
steps: Document plugin SDK preview scope, non-goals, manifest example, CLI commands, safety limitations, and first adapter roadmap.
Run full formatting, clippy, workspace tests, and CLI smoke commands.
Record any implementation deviations from plan in the final report.
convergence_criteria: README accurately reflects implemented M1 preview behavior.
All planned CLI smoke commands pass.

result.summary: README and execution audit record completed; full verification and global install finished.
result.tests_passed: fmt, clippy, workspace tests, cargo-run smoke, global install, and installed revdeck smoke all passed
